steps.title: Use the contrast with innovative
steps.content: Wong avoided the blank type of designs and instead used innovative forms and daring hues. The blank must describe the standard or conventional style she avoided.

steps.title: Reject words she embraced
steps.content: Choice A creative and Choice B bold describe the style she pursued, while Choice D understandable is unrelated. The opposite of innovative and daring is traditional. The answer is C.
